description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist geometric design. The exterior features a combination of dark and light wall finishes, with large windows and sliding glass doors providing ample natural light. The house is surrounded by a paved patio area, landscaped with several trees and shrubs, and includes outdoor amenities such as a swimming pool and patio furniture with umbrellas. The front facade showcases a prominent balcony and a main entrance with a wide glass door, while the rear side has a more private appearance with fewer windows. The property is designed for urban living, offering both privacy and outdoor leisure spaces. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing clean lines and functional outdoor areas.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a mix of dark and light exterior finishes, surrounded by a landscaped patio with a pool and outdoor furniture.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from an angle highlighting the dark facade, main entrance, and surrounding trees on the patio.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear of the house with a white exterior, fewer windows, the swimming pool, and patio umbrellas visible.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the front of the house with large windows, a balcony, the main entrance, and a spacious patio area with outdoor furniture.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite rear angle, emphasizing the dark side of the house, the pool, and the arrangement of trees and patio furniture.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide glass door, minimal steps, and a covered porch area integrated into the facade.
